logic_depth_estimate.worst_path: QR combinational (3 chained 32-bit adds + XOR + rotate) + finalize addition = ~18 LUT levels for QR + 4 for add = 22 levels

deep_review.latch_inference: OK - all combinational blocks have complete defaults
deep_review.uninitialized_registers: OK - all regs have reset values and initial declarations
deep_review.non_synthesizable: none found (reg initialization in declarations is FPGA-synthesizable)
deep_review.cdc: single clock domain - no CDC risk

functional_completeness.chacha20_qr: implements full RFC 8439 quarter-round with 4 add/XOR/rot steps
functional_completeness.chacha20_core: FSM with 3 states (IDLE/ROUND/FINALIZE), 4 parallel QR instances, column/diagonal muxing, init state save, final addition
functional_completeness.chacha20_top: reset synchronizer, 3-state FSM (IDLE/COMPUTE/OUTPUT), valid/ready handshake, backpressure support, auto counter increment

recommendation: RTL is well-structured and consistent with spec. Proceed to lint and simulation.
